title: Approval of financial agreements by commissioner of administration
doc_html:
§1003.  Approval of financial agreements by commissioner of administration

Any financial agreements made between hospitals supported by the state and colleges, universities or training agencies supported by public funds shall be made subject to approval by the commissioner of administration.  

Acts 1950, No. 392, §3.
